inputs.label: Shipping Distance
inputs.businessContext: The total distance the freight will travel from origin to destination.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total distance the freight will travel from origin to destination.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Navlunun menşeiden varış noktasına kat edeceği toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Transportentfernung vom Ursprung zum Ziel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale que le fret parcourra de l'origine à la destination.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total que recorrerá la carga desde el origen hasta el destino.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الإجمالية التي ستقطعها الشحنة من نقطة المنشأ إلى الوجهة.

inputs.label: Shipment Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of the goods being shipped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of the goods being shipped.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso total de las mercancías que se envían.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Liter
inputs.businessContext: Current cost of diesel or fuel per liter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current cost of diesel or fuel per liter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Litre başına güncel mazot veya yakıt maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Diesel- oder Kraftstoffpreis pro Liter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût actuel du diesel ou du carburant par litre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste actual del diésel o combustible por litro.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الحالية للديزل أو الوقود لكل لتر.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Average kilometers the transport vehicle travels per liter of fuel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average kilometers the transport vehicle travels per liter of fuel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakliye aracının litre yakıt başına kat ettiği ortalama kilometre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kilometer pro Liter Kraftstoff des Transportfahrzeugs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Kilomètres moyens parcourus par le véhicule de transport par litre de carburant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Kilómetros promedio que recorre el vehículo de transporte por litro de combustible.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الكيلومترات التي تقطعها مركبة النقل لكل لتر وقود.

inputs.label: Handling Rate per Kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of handling, loading, and unloading per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of handling, loading, and unloading per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogram başına elleçleme, yükleme ve boşaltma maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für Be- und Entladung pro Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de manutention, chargement et déchargement par kilogramme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste de manipulación, carga y descarga por kilogramo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكلفة المناولة والتحميل والتفريغ لكل كيلوغرام.

inputs.label: Additional Charges
inputs.businessContext: Any tolls, surcharges, or fixed costs not included elsewhere.

businessContext_i18n.en: Any tolls, surcharges, or fixed costs not included elsewhere.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Başka yerde dahil edilmeyen geçiş ücretleri, ek ücretler veya sabit maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Mautgebühren, Zuschläge oder Fixkosten, die nicht anderweitig enthalten sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout péage, surcharge ou coût fixe non inclus ailleurs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peajes, recargos o costes fijos no incluidos en otros conceptos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي رسوم مرور أو رسوم إضافية أو تكاليف ثابتة غير مدرجة في مكان آخر.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
